title: ESFA Update: 8 January 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action The first time request form for obtaining an advanced learner loans contract is now available   Information Changes to the administration of the Care to Learn and 16 to 19 schemes from the academic year 2025 to 2026   Information Further education free meals per meal rate increase for the academic year 2024 to 2025   Information Outcomes of the Review of Qualifications Reform     Latest for academies     Article Title     Information Outcomes of the Review of Qualifications Reform   Reminder The financial statements deadline has now passed   Events and webinars Academy finance professionals January power hour – academies accounts return   Events and webinars The Schools Commercial team spring webinars     Latest for local authorities     Article Title     Information The Schools Commercial team spring webinars   Information Outcomes of the Review of Qualifications Reform    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
School and academy financial management and assurance
